title: Hit Timer
description: A mod that shows you the immunity frames left on a player so you can better time your hits
body:
## Hit Timer
Hit timer is a must-have mod  for Minecraft players who want to improve on their sword pvp, or crystal pvp skills. It visualizes the immunity frames (i-frames) the enemy has left before becoming vulnerable, making it easier to time your hits properly.

## Features
- The mod comes with a nice-looking target HUD that shows the i-frames your target has using a progress bar
- You can customize the colors to anything you'd like, from white to black, and even from green to blue.
- The position is also freely customizable, allowing you to put it anywhere you want on your screen.

## Requirements for installation
You need to install [Tulip 1.2.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/tulip/version/1.2.1) for this mod to work properly, as it is the config manager that handles the custom configurations of the mod.

## Configuration settings
Hit Timer offers a range of configuration settings that allow you to customize the mod to suit your preferences. You can change the colors of the progress bar, as well as its position on your screen. This makes it easy to position the display in an area with less clutter or center it on your screen for better visibility.
